creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
This patches fixes the handling of directorys.
But ispell can't build custom directorys any more.

ispell 3.2.x it don't contain the program "unsq".
Which is part of the older 3.1.20c distribution.

German and others dictionarys can't been build
as they require to build with this tool.

I have a fix now working.

kind regards Dirk
- Dirk Meyer, Im Grund 4, 34317 Habichtswald, Germany
